title: Ravagers Have Depth
description: Ravagers now have 3D details. This includes their armor, chains, saddles, and even their monobrows!
body:
## Ravagers Have Depth

Ravagers are still the same beasts they've always been, just with some more intimidating armor! 

The only noteworthy exception to this is their newly re-colored saddles.

In vanilla, Ravagers have bright orange saddles (the same as pigs), however, this resource pack changes their saddles to a dark turquoise. This particular color palette was borrowed from the Pillagers' jeans — now they match!

---
